examples: We will walk very, very slowly, and if we feel tired we can rest by the wayside.
Amateurs fall by the wayside when the going gets tough.
Often times, they've been, you know, fallen by the wayside, and this time they were funny.
Unfortunately, when public pensions defend their investing decisions, truth may fall by the wayside.
There are going to be airlines that go by the wayside in this recession.
